vehicle.project: Father's truck restoration, slow garage work in the second bay
vehicle.note: Leonard's old truck. No deadline on this one. It gets done when it gets done.

budget.thresholdNote: Any single part or service over $300 gets confirmed before it is committed.

entry.task: Replaced front brake drums and shoes
entry.notes: Old drums were scored past turning. New ones seated clean.

entry.task: Wire-wheeled and primed the passenger door
entry.notes: Surface rust only, no rot through. Primer holding.
Over the $300 line, confirmed before ordering. Idle smoothed right out.

entry.task: New alternator and rewired the dash cluster ground
entry.notes: Gauges read true again. Old ground was the whole problem.
Found it at the flea market. Upholstery is a winter job.
Two coats down. Needs one more before color.

entry.task: Quote pulled for a full bed-wood replacement kit
entry.notes: Over the threshold. Holding until spring garage time opens up. Not committed.

openItems.item: Finish hood prep before paint booth time
Decide on the bed-wood kit, F150-024
